# Sash.Ai Forge: full content for LLM crawlers

> Sash.Ai Forge takes an AI startup idea from first conversation to a live, launched product in 6 weeks.

## Positioning

Sash.Ai Forge is a startup launchpad for non-technical founders who want to move at startup speed. Founder brings the idea; we discuss it, build it with them, and launch in 6 weeks.

The three pillars:
1. Speed: 6 weeks from first conversation to a live product.
2. Completeness: product and brand, under one roof, built by a senior AI-native CTO.
3. Caliber: senior CTO-led, AI-native products shipped. Speed without compromise.

We are not a Fractional CTO service. We are not an agency. We are a startup launchpad for non-technical founders.

## Hero

### Your AI startup, live in 6 weeks.

Come with an idea. We discuss it, build it together, and put it in front of real users. Senior CTO-led. Milestone-based. Built for founders who don't have months to wait.

## The Reality (problem agitation)

Most founders want to build AI products. Few actually ship them. You have the idea, the funding, the ambition. But building AI products is a different game. The regular playbook doesn't work.

- Can't find AI engineers: real AI engineers are rare, expensive, and already employed. Months of searching, no guarantees.
- Unclear product architecture: which models? Which stack? How will it scale? One wrong choice now means a costly rewrite when you raise.
- Slow, unpredictable dev cycles: agency timelines slip. Freelancers ghost. No one owns the outcome. Meanwhile your runway is ticking.
- No senior tech leader: without a CTO, you're guessing. Wrong hires, wrong tools, wrong priorities. Investors notice.

Sash.Ai Forge closes these gaps. One senior team, one predictable engagement, one live product in 6 weeks.

## The 4-step journey (idea to launch)

You bring the idea. We discuss it, sharpen it, build it with you, and put it in front of real users. One continuous engagement. No hand-offs, no vendor chains. You can plug us in mid-way if you already have an MVP.

1. Discuss the idea. We pressure-test the idea with you. What's real, what's noise, who it's for, why now. You leave with a sharper thesis, not a pitch deck.
2. Architect and scope. We map the AI architecture, lock the product scope, and agree the milestones. You see exactly what ships, in what order, at what price.
3. Build together. We build the product: backend, AI pipelines, frontend, with you in the loop every step. Weekly demos. Real users test as soon as there's something usable.
4. Launch. Production deploy. Brand live. First users onboarded. You walk out with a live AI product people can touch, not a demo.

One engagement end-to-end. 6 weeks from discussion to launch.

After launch (corollary, not part of the 6-week core build): we stay on as your tech partner for as long as you need us, or step back the moment you're ready. Shipping features, scaling infra, hiring your team. You're never on your own.

## How we work

We think like co-founders, price like partners.

Most agencies wait for a brief and ship what's on it. We sharpen the idea with you, own the outcome, and never hand you a surprise invoice.

- Co-founder mindset. We challenge weak ideas, propose better versions, and own outcomes with you.
- Predictable pricing. Fixed price per milestone. Always know the next number before we ship it.
- Zero lock-in. 100% of the code and IP is yours. No retainers. No revenue share.
- Built for speed. 6 weeks to a live product. Senior team, no junior hand-offs, no ramp-up lag.
- Respects your runway. Tight on cash, strong on conviction? We'll discuss cash + equity blends.

## Honest comparison (vs alternatives)

| Dimension | Agency | DIY no-code | Sash.Ai Forge |
|---|---|---|---|
| Time to launch | 6–12 mo, often slips | 1–3 mo to no-code ceiling | 6 weeks to live product |
| Your equity | 100% kept | 100% kept | 100% kept |
| AI depth | Rarely AI-native | Limited to no-code | AI-native by design |
| Risk if they leave | Moderate. Vendor lock-in | Low. But product is fragile | Low. 100% of code is yours |
| Budget model | Monthly retainer | Tool subscriptions | Milestone-based, predictable |

The real competition isn't each other. It's the calendar. Every month you spend deciding is a month a competitor ships.

## Pricing

Transparent ranges. No surprises.

Every engagement is quoted after the free AI Audit. Milestone-based, fixed-price per deliverable, so your budget stays predictable from week one.

- Idea to MVP launch. Let's talk. A live, production-grade AI product in 6 weeks. Product architecture design; LLM and agentic pipeline setup; backend and frontend build; brand, logo, domain, site.
- Product to Scale. Let's talk. For founders with an MVP who need to scale it for real users, real load, real investors. Scalable product architecture; AI model integration and fine-tuning; infrastructure and deployment; data pipelines and optimisation.
- Plug-in CTO. Let's talk. Senior AI leadership part-time, for founders with a team. Product and engineering roadmap; architecture and code reviews; technical hiring guidance; investor and customer meetings.

Bootstrapped? We discuss cash and equity blends for the right founders. Ask us in the AI Audit.

## Additional services (on request, priced separately)

Not part of the core 6-week build. Available for founders who also need them:

- Company registration: Pvt Ltd or LLP in India, or Delaware C-Corp, Singapore, UAE. Filings, DIN, PAN, TAN. Handled end-to-end with our legal partner.
- Trademark and IP: Trademark filing for brand name and logo. Copyright advice. Founder-IP assignments.
- Compliance and ops: GST, bank account, ROC filings, payroll setup, basic contracts (NDA, vendor, employment).
- Hiring and team: Founding engineer, AI engineer, product hires. We source, screen, and often embed.
- CTO in your meetings: we join your investor and customer meetings as your technology representative at CTO level. We answer the hard technical questions, back your pitch with engineering credibility, and take the heat off you.
